body:
- Temporarily fixes the build. Once [#9259](https://github.com/JuliaRegistries/General/pull/9259) merges, we can pin a specific version for this example so that this build doesn't break with changes to `Cloudy.jl`'s master

Thanks to @rohanmclure (co-authored)!
title: Fix build

body: I'm having some issues with the build in #26, so this just adds `CalibrateEmulateSample.jl` to the docs environment, and updates the packages all around.
title: Dev CES.jl to docs
